summary:
Implemented the next Anton loop task and stopped cleanly.

Changed:
- Added a practical Fuse Symptom Finder to [diagnostics.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/diagnostics.html), routing accessory power, trailer lights, audio/display, and backup/reverse symptoms into existing references without changing fuse facts.
- Added search coverage so `outlet not working` surfaces the Fuse Symptom Finder, plus Power Outlet and Trailer Lights search chips in [shared-ui.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js).
- Corrected [maintenance.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/maintenance.html): removed the unsupported Ridgeline Maintenance Minder sub-code `7` / `B127` brake-fluid example and documented brake fluid as a separate 3-year calendar item.
- Bumped the service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v247`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Sources recorded in the backlog:
- Honda 2019 Ridgeline Maintenance Minder PDF: https://owners.honda.com/utility/download?path=%2Fstatic%2Fpdfs%2F2019%2FRidgeline%2FMY19_Ridgeline_Maintenance_Minder_System.pdf
- Honda 2020 Ridgeline Maintenance Minder PDF: https://owners.honda.com/utility/download?path=%2Fstatic%2Fpdfs%2F2020%2FRidgeline%2FMY20_Ridgeline_Maintenance_Minder_System.pdf
- Honda 2017 Ridgeline Maintenance Minder PDF: https://owners.honda.com/utility/download?path=%2Fstatic%2Fpdfs%2F2017%2FRidgeline%2F2017_Ridgeline_Maintenance_Minder_System.pdf
- Fuse workflow support: https://fuse-box.info/honda/honda-ridgeline-2017-2019-fuses

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome verified Diagnostics, search, and Maintenance Minder behavior.
- Captured screenshots:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v247-diagnostics-desktop.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v247-diagnostics-mobile.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v247-search-outlet-not-working.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v247-maintenance-minder-desktop.png`

Note: `agent-last-run.json` was already dirty when I started and I left it untouched.
